name: NutriAI
tagline: AI nutrition tracker — camera-based food recognition, Apple Health sync, macro tracking with React Native + Expo
description: Mobile app that identifies food from photos and tracks nutrition automatically. Point your camera at a meal, get calories and macros. Syncs with Apple Health and Google Fit. Built with React Native and Expo for cross-platform deployment from one codebase.
content_angles: Point your camera at food, get instant nutrition data
Apple Health + Google Fit sync for unified health tracking
Cross-platform React Native — one codebase, iOS + Android
